name: tei
description: Inspect and query a Text Embeddings Inference server through its HTTP API.

settings.name: TEI URL
settings.description: Base URL of the Text Embeddings Inference server, including scheme and port. Do not include a trailing slash.

settings.name: Auth Header
settings.description: Optional full HTTP auth header for protected deployments, for example: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Leave blank for trusted local deployments.
